---
title: "Create Search Engine with web browser"
date: 2016-12-04
forum: Desktop Environments
---

### Post by Chip88 on 2016-12-04
Hey there,

I am using Vivaldi as my default web browser and trying to add a search engine for [http://tip.iatext.ulpgc.es/silabas/](http://tip.iatext.ulpgc.es/silabas/). There is a search fild, but unfortunately, when making a right click in that search field, there is no option "Add Search Engine" as it use to appear on other sites with such a search field.

I checked that in different browsers and have exactly the same issue as in Vivaldi in Chrome and Firefox. In the old Opera (ver. 12.16) and in Opera Developer it is possible to add a search engine for that search filed.

In both versions of Opera the entries appear automatically:

&#8594; **Adress**: ```
http://tip.iatext.ulpgc.es/silabas/default.aspx
```

and
&#8594; **Query String**: ```
__LASTFOCUS=&__EVENTTARGET=&__EVENTARGUMENT=&__VIEWSTATE=%%2BPGEgaHJlZj0ic2VwYXJhci1lbi1zaWxhYmFzLWdhdG8uaHRtbD9wYWxhYnJhPXJRbTRZecORaHJRIiB0aXRsZT0iU2lsYWJlYWRvciBUSVAiIHN0eWxlPSJjb2xvcjogIzY5Njk2OTsiPlNlYXJjaCB0aGUgc3RyZXNzZWQgc3lsbGFibGUgb2YgdGhlIHdvcmQgIDxiPmdhdG88L2I%2BIDwvYT48L2xpPjxsaSBzdHlsZT0icGFkZGluZy1ib3R0b206IDVweDsiPjxhIGhyZWY9InNlcGFyYXItZW4tc2lsYWJhcy1tYcOtei5odG1sP3BhbGFicmE9SU%2FDkWzDsThxR0lPIiB0aXRsZT0iU2lsYWJlYWRvciBUSVAiIHN0eWxlPSJjb2xvcjogIzY5Njk2OTsiPlNlYXJjaCB0aGUgZGlwaHRob25nLCB0cmlwaHRob25nIG9yIGhpYXR1cyBpbiB0aGUgd29yZCAgPGI%2BbWHDrXo8L2I%2BIDwvYT48L2xpPjxsaSBzdHlsZT0icGFkZGluZy1ib3R0b206IDVweDsiPjxhIGhyZWY9InNlcGFyYXItZW4tc2lsYWJhcy1QaWNhcmTDrWEuaHRtbD9wYWxhYnJhPU5TZ2TDkWs5T05TIiB0aXRsZT0iU2lsYWJlYWRvciBUSVAiIHN0eWxlPSJjb2xvcjogIzY5Njk2OTsiPlNwbGl0IHRoZSBTcGFuaXNoIHdvcmQgPGI%2BUGljYXJkw61hPC9iPiBpbnRvIHN5bGxhYmxlczwvYT48L2xpPjxsaSBzdHlsZT0icGFkZGluZy1ib3R0b206IDVweDsiPjxhIGhyZWY9InNlcGFyYXItZW4tc2lsYWJhcy1Db2JldGEuaHRtbD9wYWxhYnJhPThEdktjw7FSZzhEIiB0aXRsZT0iU2lsYWJlYWRvciBUSVAiIHN0eWxlPSJjb2xvcjogIzY5Njk2OTsiPlNwbGl0IHRoZSBTcGFuaXNoIHdvcmQgPGI%2BQ29iZXRhPC9iPiBpbnRvIHN5bGxhYmxlczwvYT48L2xpPjxsaSBzdHlsZT0icGFkZGluZy1ib3R0b206IDVweDsiPjxhIGhyZWY9InNlcGFyYXItZW4tc2lsYWJhcy1tYcOtei5odG1sP3BhbGFicmE9SU%2FDkWzDsThxR0lPIiB0aXRsZT0iU2lsYWJlYWRvciBUSVAiIHN0eWxlPSJjb2xvcjogIzY5Njk2OTsiPlNlYXJjaCB0aGUgZGlwaHRob25nLCB0cmlwaHRob25nIG9yIGhpYXR1cyBpbiB0aGUgd29yZCAgPGI%2BbWHDrXo8L2I%2BIDwvYT48L2xpPmQCBQ8PFgIfAwXMAiZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOy4mbmJzcDsuJm5ic3A7LiZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOyZuYnNwOzxhIGhyZWY9Imxpc3RhLXBhbGFicmFzLTUuaHRtbCIgdGl0bGU9IlNpbGFiZWFkb3IgVElQIiBzdHlsZT0iY29sb3I6ICM2OTY5Njk7IGZvbnQtd2VpZ2h0OiBib2xkOyI%2BbmV4dDwvYT4mbmJzcDsmbmJzcDsmbmJzcDsmbmJzcDs8YSBocmVmPSJsaXN0YS1wYWxhYnJhcy0yMTQ3NDgzNjQ3Lmh0bWwiIHRpdGxlPSJTaWxhYmVhZG9yIFRJUCIgc3R5bGU9ImNvbG9yOiAjNjk2OTY5OyBmb250LXdlaWdodDogYm9sZDsiPmxhc3Q8L2E%2BZGQYAQUeX19Db250cm9sc1JlcXVpcmVQb3N0QmFja0tleV9fFgMFC2N0bDAwJGJ0bkVOBQtjdGwwMCRidG5FUwUeY3RsMDAkTWFpbkNvb ```
```

Also the box **POST **is checked.


&#8594; How can I - maybe using the data from Opera - add a search engine in Chrome and Vivaldi?!


Thanks in advance!
Chipy
